name: ILNodeDisturbAllUpdateBits
title: ILNodeDisturbAllUpdateBits
syntax: long ILNodeDisturbAllUpdateBits(dbNode aNode, long flags, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
long ILNodeDisturbAllUpdateBits(char aNodeName[], long flags, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
description: Modifies all update bits of signals/signal groups of a node. Different fault injections are possible.This function influences a simulation node with an assigned CANoe interaction layer.

parameters.name: aNode
parameters.description: The symbolic name of a node in the database, whose update bits will be disturbed.

parameters.name: aNodeName
parameters.description: The name of a node in the database, whose update bits will be disturbed.
Update bits of signals and signal groups are disturbed.
Only signal update bits are disturbed.
Only signal group update bits are disturbed.
The disturbance uses the value in disturbanceValue as update bit.
The current update bit value is transmitted.
A random value is transmitted as update bit.
Stops the disturbance, e.g.a infinite disturbance.

parameters.name: disturbanceValue
parameters.description: This value is used in combination with the disturbanceMode.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
